nasb.text: The Child continued to grow and become strong, increasing in wisdom; and the grace of God was upon Him.

esv.text: And the child grew and became strong, filled with wisdom. And the favor of God was upon him.

cnv.text: 孩子漸漸長大，強壯起來，充滿智慧，有　神的恩典在他身上。

ccb.text: 耶稣渐渐长大，身心强健，充满智慧，上帝的恩典与祂同在。

csbs.text: 那孩子渐渐长大，刚强起来，充满智慧，并且有神的恩典在他身上。
